message:
🐛 Fix PR verifier: mirror image from gcr.io to ghcr.io (#123)

The gcr.io/kubebuilder/pr-verifier:v0.4.3 image has been removed from
Google Container Registry, causing all PR verifier checks to fail across
kubestellar repos. This change:

1. Uses the mirrored image at ghcr.io/kubestellar/pr-verifier:v0.4.3
   (built from kubernetes-sigs/kubebuilder-release-tools@v0.4.3 source)
2. Adds docker/login-action to authenticate with GHCR before pulling
3. Adds packages:read permission for GITHUB_TOKEN

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -11,11 +11,18 @@ jobs:
     permissions:
       checks: write
       pull-requests: read
+      packages: read
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
+      - name: Login to GHCR
+        uses: docker/login-action@v3
+        with:
+          registry: ghcr.io
+          username: ${{ github.actor }}
+          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
       - name: Verifier action
         id: verifier
-        uses: kubernetes-sigs/kubebuilder-release-tools@012269a88fa4c034a0acf1ba84c26b195c0dbab4 # v0.4.3
+        uses: docker://ghcr.io/kubestellar/pr-verifier:v0.4.3
         continue-on-error: true
-        with:
-          github_token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+        env:
+          INPUT_GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
